## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code quality improvement

## Related Issues
Closes #<issue_number>

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing Done
- [ ] Local smoke test (`python -m api.main` starts cleanly)
- [ ] RAGAS CI gate passes locally (`python -m evaluation.benchmark_runner --dataset evaluation/golden_dataset_ci.json --max-questions 5`)
- [ ] Red-team suite still passes (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated tests where needed
- [ ] Updated documentation where needed

## Screenshots / Evidence (if UI change)
Attach before/after screenshots for any Streamlit dashboard changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the existing style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented complex logic
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] New/changed agent code includes audit trail entries (if applicable)
